content: Just as the educational sense of reflexion frames learning as a deliberate iterative practice of reviewing past outputs to correct misunderstandings for human students, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to adopt the structured scaffolding of high school reflective writing exercises to improve their error correction consistency. This structured approach moves beyond ad-hoc LLM self-critique to embed the same metacognitive routines that help human learners consistently surface unrecognized gaps in their reasoning.
